name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖GG MARMONT MATLASS mini bucket bag style. Inspired by the natural earth tones, Gucci's enduring design continues to present new iterations season after season. For the 2023 Spring/Summer collection, sage green enriches the latest leather selections, a timeless color that stands the test of time. Here, it enriches a signature GG Marmont mini bucket bag with gold double-G hardware. Sage green Matlass chevron leather, gold hardware, cloud print and microfiber lining, suede-like surface, detachable double-G charm, 2 card slots, chain strap, drop 23.6 inches, drawstring closure, also wearable as a crossbody bag.
name_cn:

For the 2023 Spring/Summer collection, sage green enriches the latest leather selections, a timeless color that stands the test of time. Here, it enriches a signature GG Marmont mini bucket bag with gold double-G hardware. Sage green Matlass chevron leather, gold hardware, cloud print and microfiber lining, suede-like surface, detachable double-G charm, 2 card slots, chain strap, drop 23.6 inches, drawstring closure, also wearable as a crossbody bag.
Model: 575163.
Size: 19x 17x 10cm.
Color: Mint Green/Original Leather.
Made in Italy
